similar_nature_of_job: The job involves designing, developing, and maintaining high-energy pulse arc (HEA) igniter systems for various fuels. The systems are designed to produce intense electrical sparks that ignite oil/gaseous particles, creating a flame pocket in the oil spray.

details_of_work_order_submitted: The details of the work order submitted include the design and development of HEA igniter systems for various fuels, including high-speed diesel, heavy fuel oils, and gases. The systems are designed to produce intense electrical sparks that ignite oil/gaseous particles, creating a flame pocket in the oil spray.
